nasb.text: (For there were about five thousand men.) And He said to His disciples, “Have them sit down to eat in groups of about fifty each.”

esv.text: For there were about five thousand men. And he said to his disciples, “Have them sit down in groups of about fifty each.”

cnv.text: 原來男人就約有五千。他對門徒說：“叫他們一組一組地坐下，每組約五十人。”

ccb.text: 当时那里约有五千男人。 耶稣便对使徒说：“让这些人分组坐下，每组大约五十人。”

csbs.text: 当时，男人就约有五千。 耶稣对他的门徒们说：“叫他们分组坐下，每组约五十人。”
